zh.Sablé-sur-Sarthe, La Flèche, Sarthe, Pay: 法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特拉 福利艾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Savory D'ANTHENAISE於1098年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特拉 福利艾時，他的父親Savaric D'ANTHENAISE18歲，母親Mrs. Mrs. Savory20歲。他於1114年與Savarie D Anthenaise在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特拉 福利艾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Savory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): from the Middle English personal name Savaric, Old French Savari, from ancient Germanic Sabaricus, Savaricus, itself from a stem of uncertain origin + rīc ‘power(ful)’.

variants.name: Savary
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Fabien, Jacques, Normand, Philippe.
French: from the Old French personal name Savari, from ancient Germanic Sabaricus, Savaricus, composed of the elements saba, of uncertain meaning, + rīc ‘power(ful)’.
English: variant of   Savory  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Severy
meanings: From the Roman family name Severus ‘stern, severe’.

variants.name: Savery
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated in the Middle Ages from a Norman French pronunciation of   Alfred .  It is used mainly as a boy's name in Britain, while in North America it is more popular as a girl's name.

en.lifeSummary: When Savory D'ANTHENAISE was born in 1098, in La Flèche, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Savaric D'ANTHENAISE, was 18 and his mother, Mrs. Mrs. Savory, was 20. He married Savarie D Anthenaise in 1114, in La Flèche, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

Il a épousé Savarie D Anthenaise en 1114, à La Flèche, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Savory D'ANTHENAISE родился в 1098 г. в местности ла флeч, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Savaric D'ANTHENAISE было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Mrs. Savory, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Savarie D Anthenaise в 1114 г. в местности ла флeч, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
